# 原生流程表单数据

#### 简介


 本篇介绍OA中原生流程的表单数据如何导出


##### 方式一: 页面导出


流程管理->其他查询->具体流程名称->导出


[图片1: null]


##### 方式二: 数据库导出


未映射表单字段需先映射：
 流程管理->模板配置->进入指定流程模板->表单数据设置


[图片2: null]



[图片3: null]



[图片4: null]


##### 方式三: 数据库xml动态解析导出


```
select krm.fd_id,
       krm.doc_subject,
       krm.fd_number,

       table_main.fd_applicant 申请人,
       table_main.fd_activity_place 地点,
       to_date('1970-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') + table_main.fd_start_time / 1000 / 24 / 60 / 60 + 8 / 24 as 活动开始时间,
       to_date('1970-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') + table_main.fd_end_time / 1000 / 24 / 60 / 60 + 8 / 24 as 活动结束时间,

       table_detail.fd_staff_name,
       table_detail.fd_staff_login_name,
       table_detail.fd_staff_department
from km_review_main krm
     -- 主表
     LEFT JOIN XMLTable('/java/object'
          PASSING XMLTYPE(krm.extend_data_xml)
          COLUMNS fd_activity_place VARCHAR2(1024) PATH 'void/string[text()="fd_activity_place"]/following-sibling::*[1]/text()'
                 ,fd_start_time NUMBER PATH 'void/string[text()="fd_start_time"]/following-sibling::*[1]/long/text()'
                 ,fd_end_time NUMBER PATH 'void/string[text()="fd_end_time"]/following-sibling::*[1]/long/text()'
                 ,fd_applicant VARCHAR2(200) PATH 'void/string[text()="fd_applicant"]/following-sibling::*[1]/void/string[text()="name"]/following-sibling::*[1]/text()'
     ) table_main ON 1=1
     -- 明细表
     LEFT JOIN XMLTable('/java/object/void/string[text()="fd_34bc2b2915b0ee"]/following-sibling::*[1]/void/object'
          PASSING XMLTYPE(krm.extend_data_xml)
          COLUMNS fd_staff_department VARCHAR2(1024) PATH 'void/string[text()="fd_staff_department"]/following-sibling::*[1]/text()'
                 ,fd_staff_login_name VARCHAR2(1024) PATH 'void/string[text()="fd_staff_login_name"]/following-sibling::*[1]/text()'
                 ,fd_staff_name VARCHAR2(1024) PATH 'void/string[text()="fd_staff_name"]/following-sibling::*[1]/void/string[text()="name"]/following-sibling::*[1]/text()'
     ) table_detail ON 1=1
where krm.fd_template_id = '153a634bbb60d0662434ac34f8bb7ce8'
and krm.extend_file_path = 'km/review/xform/define/153a634bbb60d0662434ac34f8bb7ce8/153a634bbb60d0662434ac34f8bb7ce8_v10';
```

---
